channel.title: Widgets and UI :: Flutter en rigle.dev
channel.description: Solved Flutter widget exercises: ListView.builder, BottomNavigationBar, dark mode with ThemeMode, and async loading with FutureBuilder.

item.title: Accessibility in Flutter: solved exercise with Semantics and TalkBack/VoiceOver support
item.description: Solved Flutter accessibility exercise: Semantics widget, MergeSemantics, ExcludeSemantics, TalkBack and VoiceOver support, color contrast, and adaptive font sizes.

item.title: AnimationController and Tween in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter AnimationController and Tween exercise: explicit animations with CurvedAnimation, AnimatedBuilder and staggered sequences with Interval.

item.title: CustomPainter in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter exercise for CustomPainter: draw a progress ring and a bar chart using the Canvas API from scratch.

item.title: Hero animations in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter Hero animations exercise: shared element transitions between routes, image gallery with Hero and flight customization with flightShuttleBuilder.

item.title: Implicit animations in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter exercise for implicit animations: AnimatedContainer, AnimatedOpacity, AnimatedSwitcher and TweenAnimationBuilder with real examples.

item.title: Lottie in Flutter: solved exercise with JSON animations
item.description: Solved Lottie Flutter exercise: play JSON animations from LottieFiles, control speed, looping, and sync with user interactions.

item.title: Responsive design in Flutter: solved exercise with LayoutBuilder and MediaQuery
item.description: Solved Flutter responsive design exercise: LayoutBuilder, MediaQuery, OrientationBuilder and adaptive scaffold to adapt the UI to any screen size.

item.title: SliverAppBar collapsible in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter exercise for SliverAppBar: collapsible header with image, CustomScrollView, SliverList and parallax scroll effect.

item.title: ThemeExtension in Flutter: solved exercise with custom color system
item.description: Solved ThemeExtension Flutter exercise: build a custom design token system, integrate with ThemeData, support dark mode, and use typed access with Theme.of(context).extension.

item.title: Long lists and images in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Improve long-list performance with image caching and efficient builders.

item.title: Reduce unnecessary rebuilds in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Optimize rendering with const widgets, keys, and state selectors.

item.title: Dark Mode in Flutter with ThemeMode: solved exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter dark mode exercise with ThemeMode to switch between light and dark themes cleanly.

item.title: BottomNavigationBar in Flutter: solved exercise with IndexedStack
item.description: Solved BottomNavigationBar Flutter exercise using IndexedStack to preserve tab state between sections.

item.title: ListView.builder in Flutter: solved exercise with dynamic list
item.description: Solved ListView.builder Flutter exercise to render long dynamic lists efficiently with reusable item widgets.
